runtime_gate.baseline: run.sh compiles and runs a minimal same-toolchain console ABC before classifying any runtime/stdout behavior as product behavior
runtime_gate.blocked_behavior: if the console baseline aborts, segfaults, or otherwise cannot produce stdout, run.sh records RUNTIME_BLOCKED and continues compile/import/API/decommission validation
runtime_gate.optional_smoke: set ARK_VALIDATE_RUNTIME=1 only when the local ark runtime baseline is healthy to run the demo_hap driver smoke and stat dist/harB.abc, dist/harA.abc, and dist/entry.abc

expected_failures_reported: If es2panda cannot compile the canonical product entrypoint or required ETS UT drivers, validation fails non-zero.
If BaseMode no longer validates graph before ArkTSConfigGenerator creation, validation fails non-zero.
If ArkTS driver sources reference compile_process_worker.ts, compile_thread_worker.ts, or TaskManager.ts, validation fails non-zero.
If runtime baseline succeeds but BaseMode runtime contract test fails, validation fails non-zero.
If ARK_VALIDATE_RUNTIME=1 and demo_hap output ABC artifacts are absent or empty, validation fails non-zero.
